# Documentacao da Migracao - Reward Program

## Resumo

O codigo do Programa de Pontos/Hub de Recompensas foi migrado do repositorio `card-place` para o novo repositorio `rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram`. Durante a migracao, o gerenciamento de estado foi convertido de Redux para Zustand, seguindo o novo Style Guide da empresa.

## O que foi feito

### 1. Criacao do Novo Repositorio

- Novo repositorio: `rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram`
- Tipo: Microfrontend React Native
- Exporta TypeScript puro para consumo pelo SuperApp

### 2. Migracao de Redux para Zustand

Todo o codigo que utilizava Redux foi convertido para Zustand, seguindo o padrao SOLID da arquitetura de servicos.

#### Arquivos Redux Removidos

- `src/redux/ducks/points.ts`
- `src/redux/ducks/rescue.ts`
- `src/redux/ducks/getMarketplace.ts`
- `src/redux/reducers/Models/index.ts`
- `src/redux/reducers/index.ts`
- `src/redux/sagas/points/models/index.ts`
- Pasta `src/redux/` completamente removida

#### Stores Zustand Criados

| Dominio      | Store                      | Descricao                           |
|--------------|----------------------------|-------------------------------------|
| airlineMiles | airlineMiles.store.ts      | Milhas aereas                       |
| extract      | extract.store.ts           | Extrato e saldo de pontos           |
| parameter    | parameter.store.ts         | Parametros do programa de pontos    |
| permission   | permission.store.ts        | Permissoes e acordos                |
| products     | products.store.ts          | Produtos para resgate de pontos     |
| rescue       | rescue.store.ts            | Operacoes de resgate                |
| marketplace  | marketplace.store.ts       | Dados do marketplace                |

#### Mapeamento Redux -> Zustand

| Campo Redux (pointsReducer)     | Localizacao Zustand                          |
|---------------------------------|----------------------------------------------|
| points                          | pointsBalance.points (extract store)         |
| isLoadingBalance                | pointsBalance.status === LOADING             |
| products                        | pointsProducts.products (products store)     |
| isLoadingProducts               | pointsProducts.status === LOADING            |
| pointsQuantity                  | parameterPointsProgram.pointsQuantity        |
| conversionFactor                | parameterPointsProgram.conversionFactor      |

| Campo Redux (rescueReducer)     | Localizacao Zustand                          |
|---------------------------------|----------------------------------------------|
| isLoading                       | rescue.status === LOADING                    |
| isError                         | rescue.status === ERROR                      |
| status                          | rescue.responseStatus                        |

| Campo Redux (getMarketplaceReducer) | Localizacao Zustand                      |
|-------------------------------------|------------------------------------------|
| isLoading                           | marketplace.status === LOADING           |
| isError                             | marketplace.status === ERROR             |
| data                                | marketplace.data                         |

### 3. Hooks Criados

| Hook            | Arquivo                              | Utilizado por                    |
|-----------------|--------------------------------------|----------------------------------|
| usePoints       | src/services/hooks/usePoints.ts      | Points, InvoiceCashback*         |
| useRescue       | src/services/hooks/useRescue.ts      | InvoiceCashbackSummary           |
| usePermission   | src/services/hooks/usePermission.ts  | InvoiceCashbackSummary           |
| useMarketplace  | src/services/hooks/useMarketplace.ts | RewardProgramMarketplace         |
| useAirlineMiles | src/services/hooks/useAirlineMiles.ts| AirlineMilesMarketplace          |

### 4. Telas Migradas

Todas as 10 telas foram migradas para o padrao Hook Component (index.ts para logica + view.tsx para renderizacao):

| Tela                        | Status    | Observacoes                              |
|-----------------------------|-----------|------------------------------------------|
| AirlineMilesMarketplace     | Migrada   | Usa useAirlineMiles                      |
| ExtractRewardProgram        | Migrada   | Usa useRootStore direto                  |
| LearnMoreRewardProgram      | Migrada   | Usa useRootStore direto                  |
| MyOrdersRewardProgram       | Migrada   | Usa useRootStore direto                  |
| Points                      | Migrada   | Usa usePoints                            |
| PointsDetail                | Migrada   | Sem estado global (apenas route params)  |
| RewardProgramMarketplace    | Migrada   | Usa useMarketplace                       |
| InvoiceCashbackOnboarding   | Migrada   | Usa usePoints                            |
| InvoiceCashbackPoints       | Migrada   | Usa usePoints                            |
| InvoiceCashbackSummary      | Migrada   | Usa usePermission, usePoints, useRescue  |

### 5. Estrutura de Servicos (Arquitetura SOLID)

```
src/services/
├── api/           # Clientes HTTP (comunicacao com backend)
├── models/        # Tipos, interfaces, enums
├── repository/    # Mapeamento de dados
├── services/      # Logica de negocio
├── store/         # Slices Zustand
├── hooks/         # Hooks de servico
└── utils/         # Helpers (cleanup, participantId)
```

### 6. Remocao de Dependencias Legadas

- Removida pasta `src/TO_BE_REMOVED/` (codigo temporario de migracao)
- Removido `redux-mock-store` do devDependencies
- Atualizado `styled-components.d.ts` para usar tipos do design-system

### 7. Correcoes de Lint e TypeScript

- 0 erros de lint
- 6 warnings de lint (pre-existentes, relacionados a inline styles)
- Todos os 113 testes passando

### 8. Exports do Microfrontend

O arquivo `src/index.ts` exporta:

```typescript
export { RewardsProgramRoutes } from './routes';
export { type RewardsProgramRootStore } from './services';
export { setRewardsProgramSlices } from './services/store/slices';
export { clearRewardsProgramStore } from './services/utils';
```

## Padroes Seguidos

### Hook Component Pattern

Cada tela segue o padrao:
- `index.ts` - contem a logica (hook)
- `view.tsx` - contem apenas renderizacao (componente puro)
- `Models/index.ts` - tipos e interfaces

### Zustand Store Pattern

Cada store segue o padrao StateCreator com:
- Estado inicial tipado
- Actions para mutacoes
- Reset para cleanup

### Alias `~/`

Todos os imports de `~/` resolvem para o codigo do SuperApp em runtime:
- `~/store` -> Store Zustand do SuperApp
- `~/redux/*` -> Redux legado do SuperApp

## Observacoes Importantes

1. **usePermission** usa `useSelector` do SuperApp para `customerReducer.nrc` - isso e intencional pois depende do estado do SuperApp
2. A logica de negocio foi mantida identica ao codigo original
3. Nenhuma mudanca de comportamento foi introduzida
4. Todas as features foram validadas atraves de testes automatizados

## Validacao

- `npm run lint`: 0 erros
- `npm test`: 113 testes passando em 17 suites
- `npm run typecheck`: passa sem erros

## Referencias

- Style Guide: `.claude/STYLE_GUIDE.md`
- Progresso detalhado: `.claude/progress.txt`

```typescript
import { useCallback } from 'react';
import { useShallow } from 'zustand/shallow';
import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
import {
  getPointsProducts,
  clearPointsProducts,
  getPointsBalance,
  getParameterPointsProgram,
} from '../services';
import {
  PointsProductsStatus,
  PointsBalanceStatus,
  ParameterPointsProgramStatus,
} from '../models';

export function usePoints() {
  // Products from products store
  const pointsProducts = useRootStore(useShallow((state) => state.pointsProducts));
  const { pointsProductsActions } = useRootStore.getState();

  // Balance from extract store (pointsBalance)
  const pointsBalance = useRootStore(useShallow((state) => state.pointsBalance));

  // Parameterization from parameter store
  const parameterPointsProgram = useRootStore(
    useShallow((state) => state.parameterPointsProgram)
  );

  const requestInitialData = useCallback(async () => {
    await Promise.all([
      getPointsBalance(),
      getPointsProducts(),
      getParameterPointsProgram(),
    ]);
  }, []);

  const requestPointsBalance = useCallback(async () => {
    await getPointsBalance();
  }, []);

  const requestPointsProducts = useCallback(async () => {
    await getPointsProducts();
  }, []);

  const requestParameterization = useCallback(async () => {
    await getParameterPointsProgram();
  }, []);

  const clear = useCallback(() => {
    clearPointsProducts();
  }, []);

  return {
    // Balance (from extract store - pointsBalance)
    points: pointsBalance.points,
    isLoadingBalance: pointsBalance.status === PointsBalanceStatus.LOADING,
    isErrorBalance: pointsBalance.status === PointsBalanceStatus.ERROR,

    // Products (from products store)
    products: pointsProducts.products,
    isLoadingProducts: pointsProducts.status === PointsProductsStatus.LOADING,
    isErrorProducts: pointsProducts.status === PointsProductsStatus.ERROR,

    // Parameterization (from parameter store)
    pointsQuantity: parameterPointsProgram.pointsQuantity,
    conversionFactor: parameterPointsProgram.conversionFactor,
    isLoadingParameterization:
      parameterPointsProgram.status === ParameterPointsProgramStatus.LOADING,
    isErrorParameterization:
      parameterPointsProgram.status === ParameterPointsProgramStatus.ERROR,

    // Actions
    requestPointsBalance,
    requestPointsProducts,
    requestParameterization,
    requestInitialData,
    clear,
  };
}
```

import { useCallback } from 'react';
import { useShallow } from 'zustand/shallow';
import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
import { getMarketplace, clearMarketplace } from '../services';
import { MarketplaceStatus } from '../models';

export function useMarketplace() {
  const marketplace = useRootStore(useShallow((state) => state.marketplace));

  const requestGetMarketplace = useCallback(
    async (params: Record<string, string>) => {
      await getMarketplace(params);
    },
    []
  );

  const clear = useCallback(() => {
    clearMarketplace();
  }, []);

  return {
    data: marketplace.data,
    isLoading: marketplace.status === MarketplaceStatus.LOADING,
    isError: marketplace.status === MarketplaceStatus.ERROR,
    requestGetMarketplace,
    clear,
  };
}
```
